changeSet.author: openelis-virologylab

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'VirologyLab Laboratory' AND is_template = true

changeSet.comment: Remove non-GBD pages from VirologyLab notebooks that were added by old Virology changesets
changeSet.sql: DELETE FROM clinlims.notebook_page WHERE notebook_id IN ( SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'VirologyLab Laboratory' OR (title LIKE '%VirologyLab%' AND is_template = false) ) AND page_order > 10;

DELETE FROM clinlims.notebook_page WHERE notebook_id IN ( SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'VirologyLab Laboratory' OR (title LIKE '%VirologyLab%' AND is_template = false) ) AND title IN ( 'Feeding', 'Virus Isolation', 'Packaging', 'Titer Measurement', 'Genome Sequencing', 'Seed Virus Production', 'Preclinical & Clinical Trials', 'Final Product Packaging', 'Media Preparation', 'Cell Culture', 'Quality Control', 'Virus Culture', 'Dark Room Imaging', 'Formulation' );
